description: Templates offered in the New Site dialog (Sites.vue advanced mode). Each entry's `fields` object is spread into the newSite reactive object when the user picks a template. Keep IDs stable — they're referenced by saved drafts and user documentation.

templates.label: WordPress (PHP 8.4, SSL)
templates.notes: Classic LAMP-style site; SSL on so login cookies are secure.

templates.label: Laravel (PHP 8.4, SSL)
templates.notes: Document root should point at the /public directory.

templates.label: Nette (PHP 8.4, SSL)
templates.notes: Document root should point at the /www directory.

templates.label: Symfony (PHP 8.4, SSL)
templates.notes: Document root should point at the /public directory.

templates.label: Next.js (Node proxy, SSL)
templates.notes: Node upstream port must be configured after creation.

templates.label: Node.js (Node proxy)
templates.notes: Node upstream port must be configured after creation.
